name: Medregal (SS-480)
events: 20 May 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) arrived at Newport, Rhode Island for torpedo trials.
23 May 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials, USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN), departed Newport, Rhode Island for the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
4 Jun 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
16 Jun 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for the Panama Canal Zone.
25 Jun 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from New London, Connecticut.
27 Jun 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for the Portsmouth Navy Yard. She was to return due to serious defects.
4 Jul 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) arrived at the Portsmouth Navy Yard from the Panama Canal Zone.
21 Jul 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for the Panama Canal Zone.
29 Jul 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from New London, Connecticut.
13 Aug 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.
24 Aug 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) returned to the Panama Canal Zone. With the war now over she was ordered to return to the Atlantic.
31 Aug 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Key West, Florida.
4 Sep 1945 USS Medregal (Cdr. W.H. Wright, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida from the Panama Canal Zone.
6 Feb 1969 USS Medregal sank the submarine USS Redfish (AGSS 395) off the coast of San Diego, California for target practice. (1)
